guthrum.name: Guthrum's Host
guthrum.text: Gain +1 in a region containing an inactive Burh or royal seat.

sea_kings.name: Seaborne Host
sea_kings.text: When Raiding, may choose a connected coastal region instead of the shortest route.

hastein.name: Hæsten's Host
hastein.text: The first negotiation with this Host costs 1 additional Wealth.

thames_army.name: Thames Host
thames_army.text: May move two River connections while Seeking a camp.

priorities.name: Shield of the Shires
priorities.resolve: Once per Scenario, after a Raid would reduce Readiness, lose 1 Obligation to prevent that loss.
priorities.legacy: Add 2 if no Wessex region is Exhausted.

priorities.name: War Leader
priorities.resolve: Once per Scenario, after both battle dice are rolled, add 2 to the West Saxon total.
priorities.legacy: Add 2 if Alfred won at least two battles.

priorities.name: Builder of Burhs
priorities.resolve: Once per Scenario, Fortify costs 1 Wealth and does not reduce the region's Readiness.
priorities.legacy: Add 2 if three or more Burhs are active.

priorities.name: Lawgiver
priorities.resolve: Once per Scenario, after using a KINGDOM effect, gain 1 Obligation.
priorities.legacy: Add 2 if Reform is 4 or more.

priorities.name: Maker of Terms
priorities.resolve: Once per Scenario, after a Negotiation roll, add 2 to that roll.

priorities.name: Keeper of the Harvest
priorities.resolve: Once per Scenario, after Stewarding, recover one other eligible region by one step.
priorities.legacy: Add 2 if four or more Wessex regions are Ready.

priorities.name: Lord of Saxons and Mercians
priorities.resolve: Once per Scenario, place the Mercian allied force with Alfred until the end of the round.
priorities.legacy: Add 2 if English Mercia is Ready and London has no Host or camp.

priorities.name: Guardian of the Household
priorities.resolve: Once per Scenario, one Household force contributes 3 instead of 1 in a battle or Clash.
priorities.legacy: Add 2 if both Household forces survive.

commands.name: Call the Fyrd
commands.command: Muster from one additional adjacent Ready region.
commands.kingdom: Steward. If the region becomes Ready, gain 1 Obligation instead of Wealth.

commands.name: Royal Retainers
commands.command: March, then Confront with +1 West Saxon total.
commands.kingdom: Return one lost Household force by spending 2 Wealth.

commands.name: Fortified Bridge
commands.command: A Danish Host using a River connection stops; move Alfred there.
commands.kingdom: Pay 1 Wealth to activate the Reading or London Burh and gain 1 Reform.

commands.name: Divide the Fyrd
commands.command: Leave up to two fyrds behind, then March. They defend without Alfred this round.
commands.kingdom: Gain 1 Obligation; you cannot Muster this round.

commands.name: Ride to the Muster
commands.command: Move Alfred up to two connections, then Muster one local Ready fyrd.
commands.kingdom: Gain 1 Legitimacy if Alfred ends in a Depleted region.

commands.name: The Refuge at Athelney
commands.command: Move Alfred and Household forces to Athelney; Danish Hosts cannot follow this round.
commands.kingdom: Set Legitimacy to 2 if lower, then make Athelney Depleted.

commands.name: Choose the Ground
commands.command: Confront with Drive Off; reroll the West Saxon die once.
commands.kingdom: Reveal both Crises in next round's group. Choose which one will occur.

commands.name: Forced Levy
commands.command: Emergency Muster up to two Depleted regions; lose only 1 Obligation total.

commands.name: English Mercian Aid
commands.command: Place one allied force in English Mercia or London for this round.
commands.kingdom: Gain 1 Reform and 1 Legitimacy if no Danish Host occupies English Mercia.

commands.name: Offer Terms
commands.kingdom: Spend 2 Wealth to place an Oath without rolling; lose 1 Legitimacy.

commands.name: Hostages and Baptism
commands.command: After a successful negotiation, reduce Strength by 1 and gain 1 Legitimacy.
commands.kingdom: If a Host is Strength 2 or less, spend 1 Wealth to gain 1 Reform and 1 Legitimacy.

commands.name: Repair the Roads
commands.kingdom: Pay 1 Wealth: gain 1 Reform, then Steward.

commands.name: Law and Assembly
commands.command: Gain 1 Obligation, then return any number of fyrds with Alfred.
commands.kingdom: Gain 1 Reform and either 1 Legitimacy or 1 Obligation.

commands.name: Restore London
commands.command: Remove a fortified camp from London or move a Host there to Wallingford.
commands.kingdom: If London is clear, activate its Burh and gain 2 Reform; pay 2 Wealth.

commands.name: Prepare the Succession
commands.command: One Household force grants +2 instead of +1 in this battle.
commands.kingdom: Pay 1 Wealth: gain 1 Legitimacy and 1 Reform.

crises.name: The Host at Reading
crises.arrival: Make Reading Depleted if it is Ready.
crises.design: If Alfred is west of Wilton, lose 1 Legitimacy.

crises.name: Battle Without Rest
crises.arrival: Increase Service by 1 if any fyrd is in the field.
crises.design: A West Saxon loss this round also reduces Obligation by 1.

crises.name: A Royal Death
crises.design: Gain it back if Alfred wins or negotiates this round.

crises.name: Winter at Wareham
crises.arrival: Move the Seaborne Host to Wareham if it is undefended.
crises.design: If it establishes a fortified camp, lose 1 Obligation.

crises.name: Oaths Broken
crises.arrival: Remove Guthrum's Oath or increase its Strength by 1.
crises.design: Negotiation with Guthrum suffers -1 this round.

crises.name: The Taking of Chippenham
crises.arrival: Move Guthrum's Host one connection toward Winchester.
crises.design: Deactivate the Burh where Guthrum's Host ends, if any.

crises.name: Refuge at Athelney
crises.arrival: If Winchester is occupied, move Alfred and Household forces to Athelney.
crises.design: If Alfred is at Athelney, gain 1 Obligation; otherwise recover Exeter or Wareham one step.

crises.name: The Muster at Egbert's Stone
crises.arrival: Recover Wilton or Athelney one step.

crises.name: Terms After Battle
crises.arrival: If Guthrum is Strength 2 or less, Negotiation costs no Wealth.

crises.name: Ships in the Channel
crises.arrival: Increase Seaborne Host Strength by 1. Its Raid target is the nearer of Kent or Wareham; ties favor Kent.
crises.design: An inactive coastal Burh cannot protect Readiness this round.

crises.name: London Contested
crises.arrival: Lose 1 Wealth unless London has an active Burh.
crises.design: If London is clear at round end, gain 1 Legitimacy.

crises.name: Two Great Hosts
crises.arrival: Increase Hæsten's Host and the Thames Host by 1.
crises.design: If they share a region, lose 1 Legitimacy.

crises.name: Across the Weald
crises.arrival: Move Hæsten's Host to Kent if it is elsewhere.
crises.design: If Kent is Exhausted, Hæsten's Host acts again with Seek Camp.

crises.name: Fortified Camps
crises.arrival: The strongest Host in a Wessex region without a camp establishes one; otherwise it Musters.
crises.design: Blockade costs no Wealth this round.

crises.name: The Long Pursuit
crises.arrival: Lose 1 Obligation or return one fyrd to its home reserve.
crises.design: If no fortified camp remains, gain 1 Reform.

mandate.name: An Army Still Answers
mandate.text: Win one battle and finish with at least one Wessex region Ready.

mandate.name: Preserve the West
mandate.text: Athelney must remain free of a fortified camp and Alfred must Muster there at least once.

mandate.name: Victory and Terms
mandate.text: Reduce Guthrum's Host to Strength 3 or less, then negotiate successfully without Obligation falling below 2.

mandate.name: Connected Defense
mandate.text: Finish with active Burhs in three connected regions and no fortified camp in Wessex.

mandate.name: Shared Frontier
mandate.text: Activate London and finish with English Mercia Ready and Legitimacy 4 or more.

mandate.name: Keep the Hosts Apart
mandate.text: Hæsten's Host and the Thames Host may never end a round together; remove at least two fortified camps.

mandate.name: Deny a Lasting Camp
mandate.text: Finish with at most two fortified camps and use both Delay and Blockade during the Scenario.

mandate.name: Three Burdens
mandate.text: Survive the early crisis, settle one Host, and finish with three active Burhs, Reform 4, and a Ready royal seat.
